sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116111" key="w)kueph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠκῠ-επής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n116111.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quick-speaking,</tr_> of Apollo, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
